[继]
Simplified from 継 ( 糹 → 纟 ). 継 is a variant of 繼 .

[繼]
Phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *keːɡs ): semantic 糸 ( “ rope ” ) + phonetic 㡭 ( jì ) .
The original form may have depicted four 幺 (“silk”).

[継] former (1935–1936) ROC simplified, former (1969–1976) Singaporean simplified, and variant form of 繼.
